business-model-canvas.en: The chosen Ansoff quadrant predicts which BMC blocks must change: penetration → channels/customer-relationships; market dev → segments/channels; product dev → value-proposition/key-resources; diversification → nearly everything.
business-model-canvas.zh: 所选的安索夫象限直接预言 BMC 哪些块必须改：渗透 → 渠道/客户关系；市场开发 → 客户细分/渠道；产品开发 → 价值主张/关键资源；多元化 → 几乎所有块。

portfolio-map.en: Diversification moves should appear as new Explore pins on the Portfolio Map; product or market development should appear as branches or movements on existing pins.
portfolio-map.zh: 多元化动作应该成为 Portfolio Map 上新的 Explore pin；产品 / 市场开发应该是现有 pin 上的分支或移动。

design-criteria-canvas.en: Encode the constraint the next bet must respect (must share existing channels, must reuse current production base) so the team does not slip from one quadrant into another by accident.
design-criteria-canvas.zh: 编码下一个动作必须满足的约束（必须复用现有渠道、必须复用现有生产基础），防止团队无意中从一个象限滑到另一个。

bcg-growth-share-matrix.en: BCG classifies existing businesses; Ansoff picks the growth direction for one business. Multi-business: BCG first (allocate across SBUs) → Ansoff per business (pick direction). Single business: skip BCG, use Ansoff.
bcg-growth-share-matrix.zh: BCG 给现有业务分类；Ansoff 为单一业务选增长方向。多业务：先 BCG 在 SBU 间分配，再对每个业务用 Ansoff 选方向。单业务：跳过 BCG，直接用 Ansoff。

three-horizons-map.en: H1 work is usually penetration; H2 is often product or market development; H3 is often diversification or new-market disruption. Position the Ansoff quadrant within the time-portfolio.
three-horizons-map.zh: H1 通常是渗透；H2 常常是产品或市场开发；H3 常常是多元化或新市场颠覆。把 Ansoff 象限放进时间组合的位置。

description.en: A specific growth bet under consideration — name the product, the market, and the unit size.
description.zh: 正在考虑的具体增长押注——写明产品、市场和单位规模。

description.en: BMC blocks, customer relationships, capabilities, or channels that carry over unchanged from today's business.
description.zh: 从今天的业务原封不动延续过来的 BMC 块、客户关系、能力或渠道。

description.en: New channels, new resources, new partners, or new cost structure the move requires.
description.zh: 动作所需的新渠道、新资源、新伙伴或新成本结构。

description.en: The specific assumption that, if false, would kill the move. Falsifiable, with a metric.
description.zh: 如果不成立就会让动作崩盘的具体假设。可被证伪，带指标。

description.en: Organisational capacity / management bandwidth limit that may force a sequence rather than parallel pursuit.
description.zh: 可能迫使你顺序而非并行推进的组织容量 / 管理带宽限制。
